summary: Test suite covers core happy paths and basic flaky detection but has significant gaps. Unit tests (aggregate.bats) miss error handling for parse_json (missing file, malformed JSON), empty result files, invalid durations, and edge cases like all-skipped or all-failed runs. Workflow integration tests (workflow.bats) use fragile Python YAML modification mid-test to override fixtures, which is brittle and unmaintainable. Missing: error path testing (jq unavailable, malformed inputs), boundary conditions (special characters in test names, negative durations, duration precision validation), syntax validation (shellcheck, bash -n), and proper fixture organization. Workflow structure checks are present but limited. The act integration approach is ambitious but undermined by the YAML rewriting hack. Would catch obvious regressions but miss edge cases, error scenarios, and input validation issues.
